new_value: {"notes":"Commit: e3cb5843b - Enabled easyDMA:true on SPI1 in nrf52840_lichen.repl to fix nrfx_spim timeout and SX1262 RX (per validation memory). T-Echo Renode now has better radio support. Additional RX/CS fixes in r7h4.6 child."}
easyDMA enabled for SX1262 SPI (commit e3cb5843b). Renode nRF52840 support improved.
